tagline: Hotels owned or co-owned via Al-Bahar Group, IFA HR, AQARAT, AIM, UIP and YOTEL — May 2026

hotels.name: YOTEL New York Times Square
hotels.owner: YOTEL portfolio (Al-Bahar Group ~95% via Med Al-Bahar Intl / AQARAT / UIP)
hotels.notes: Brand's flagship city hotel, acquired by Al-Bahar Group 2011. MiMA tower, Hell's Kitchen / Times Square West. 170 sq ft cabins.

hotels.name: YOTEL Boston Seaport
hotels.notes: Seaport District; cabins range 152-487 sq ft; rooftop bar.

hotels.name: YOTEL Washington DC
hotels.notes: Capitol Hill; conversion of former Liaison Washington Capitol Hill. Opened February 1, 2021.

hotels.name: YOTEL Miami
hotels.owner: YOTEL portfolio (Al-Bahar Group; asset owned by Aria Development Group, franchised to Yotel)
hotels.notes: Downtown Miami; first combined Yotel + YotelPad concept globally. 222 hotel cabins + 231 YotelPad residences. Opened June 1, 2022.

hotels.name: YOTEL San Francisco
hotels.notes: Mid-Market / SoMa; adaptive reuse of historic Grant Building. ~120 sq ft micro-rooms.

hotels.name: YOTELPAD Park City
hotels.owner: YOTEL portfolio (Al-Bahar Group; asset owned by Replay Destinations, franchised to Yotel)
hotels.notes: Canyons Village at Park City Mountain Resort; first YotelPad worldwide. Opened December 17, 2020. Studio to 3BR PADs.

hotels.name: YOTEL London City
hotels.notes: Clerkenwell; brand's first London city hotel. Near Farringdon Station.

hotels.name: YOTEL Edinburgh
hotels.notes: First Yotel in Scotland. 5 min walk to Princes Street. Office building conversion.

hotels.name: YOTEL Glasgow
hotels.notes: Opened May 2021. Office-to-hotel conversion opposite Glasgow Central Station.

hotels.name: YOTEL Manchester Deansgate
hotels.owner: YOTEL portfolio (Al-Bahar Group; franchise to Qbic-converted property)
hotels.notes: Rebrand of Qbic Manchester completed Q1 2022; first Yotel UK franchise. Ground-floor MOTLEY restaurant. 15-26 sqm cabins.

hotels.name: YOTEL Amsterdam
hotels.notes: Amsterdam Noord. First Yotel in the Netherlands. Opened November 2019.

hotels.name: YOTEL Porto
hotels.notes: Opened 28 May 2021. Porto city centre. Held by UIP (Bahar Chairman & co-CEO) — the only Al-Bahar property that sits in both YOTEL and UIP portfolios.

hotels.name: YOTEL Geneva Lake
hotels.notes: Opened April 2024. Located in Founex on Lake Geneva, ~15 km from Geneva city centre, ~15 min drive from Geneva Airport. HVGGE Nordic-inspired restaurant + rooftop bar.

hotels.name: YOTEL Singapore Orchard Road
hotels.notes: First Yotel in Asia. 30 floors. Robot delivery droids. Rooftop pool.

hotels.name: YOTEL Tokyo Ginza
hotels.owner: YOTEL portfolio (Al-Bahar Group; opened with Frasers Hospitality)
hotels.notes: Grand opened June 2025. Brand's first hotel in Japan. Ginza / Shimbashi.

hotels.name: YOTEL Bangkok Sukhumvit
hotels.address: Cloud 11, Sukhumvit Road (300m skywalk from BTS Punnawithi)
hotels.owner: YOTEL portfolio (Al-Bahar Group; asset MQDC / Cloud 11, franchise to Yotel under Select by Hilton)
hotels.notes: First Yotel in Thailand. Inside Cloud 11 mixed-use creator-economy hub in South Sukhumvit. 23rd-floor sky bar. Listed under operating hotels on yotel.com; brand's Thailand debut.

hotels.name: YOTELAIR London Gatwick
hotels.address: Arrivals Concourse, South Terminal, London Gatwick Airport
hotels.notes: Brand's first ever property worldwide. Landside, South Terminal. Bookable by the hour.

hotels.name: YOTELAIR Amsterdam Schiphol
hotels.address: Vertrekpassage 118, Schiphol Airport (airside, Lounge 2 near Pier D)
hotels.notes: Airside transit hotel. Requires onward boarding pass. Opening year reported as 2008 or 2009 by different sources.

hotels.name: YOTELAIR Paris Charles de Gaulle
hotels.notes: Opened November 2016. Airside transit hotel in Terminal 2E satellite L.

hotels.name: YOTEL Istanbul Airport (Landside)
hotels.address: Departures floor, near entrance 7, Istanbul Airport (IST)
hotels.notes: Landside, accessible without boarding pass. Part of Istanbul Airport combined Yotel property (171 landside + 280 airside = 451 cabins total, largest airport hotel in Europe).

hotels.name: YOTELAIR Istanbul Airport (Airside)
hotels.address: Duty Free zone, airside, Istanbul Airport (IST), Terminal Caddesi No:1
hotels.notes: Airside transit hotel. Requires international boarding pass. Sister property to Yotel Istanbul Airport Landside.

hotels.name: YOTELAIR Singapore Changi Airport
hotels.notes: Opened 12 April 2019. First YotelAir in Asia. Inside Jewel Changi (landside / public, 4th floor).

hotels.name: YOTEL Kuala Lumpur
hotels.address: KLCC / Golden Triangle (near Petronas Towers, KL Convention Centre)
hotels.owner: YOTEL portfolio (Al-Bahar Group; asset High Street Holdings, franchise to Yotel)
hotels.notes: First Yotel in Malaysia. KLCC district, walking distance to Petronas Towers and KL Convention Centre. Robotic concierge, motorised SmartBeds, rooftop pool and bar. PDF (May 2026) lists as 2026 pipeline; yotel.com lists as operating — keeping as announced until opening confirmed.

hotels.name: YOTEL Athens
hotels.owner: YOTEL portfolio (Al-Bahar Group; asset Valpre Capital, franchise to Yotel)
hotels.notes: First Yotel project in Greece, marketed as YOTELPAD (aparthotel). 113 PADs across three buildings: Iras (Neos Kosmos), Miltiadou (Monastiraki / Syntagma), Peiraios (Omonoia flagship with rooftop). Slated to open 2027 per PDF.

hotels.name: YOTEL Belfast
hotels.owner: YOTEL portfolio (Al-Bahar Group; asset Andras House, franchise to Yotel)
hotels.notes: New-build at Shaftesbury Square. First Yotel in Northern Ireland. Operated by Andras House Hotels. PDF (May 2026) lists 2028 expected open.

hotels.name: YOTEL Lisbon
hotels.notes: Announced as part of Yotel's European pipeline. Exact address, room count, and developer not publicly disclosed at time of writing.

hotels.name: YOTEL NEOM Oxagon
hotels.owner: YOTEL portfolio (Al-Bahar Group; asset NEOM, franchise to Yotel)
hotels.notes: First Yotel in Saudi Arabia; first hotel announced in Oxagon (floating industrial city within NEOM). Exact street address not yet published.

hotels.name: Mövenpick Hotel & Residence Laguna Tower
hotels.notes: Part of IFA HR's Laguna Tower mixed-use scheme in JLT. IFA HR is ~43% owned by IFA Holding (which is 20.85% Med Al-Bahar Holding); Bahar is Vice Chairman.

hotels.name: Fairmont Zanzibar
hotels.notes: IFA HR-owned beach resort, Fairmont-branded. Tagged 'Fairmont Zanzibar / Zanzibar Beach Hotel' in IFA disclosures.

hotels.name: Zimbali Lodge
hotels.notes: Boutique lodge within IFA HR's Zimbali Coastal Resort north of Durban. Anchor of the broader Zimbali Coastal / Zimbali Lakes resort-residence development.

hotels.name: Legend Golf & Safari Resort
hotels.owner: IFA Hotels & Resorts (50% JV with Legend Lodges Hotels & Resorts)
hotels.notes: 50/50 JV between IFA HR and Legend Lodges since 2007. Signature 18-hole Signature Course (each hole designed by a different pro) plus a par-3 'Extreme 19th' atop Hanglip mountain. Big-five safari operation.

hotels.name: Arabella Beach Hotel Kuwait
hotels.notes: Opened May 2024 as Kuwait's first Vignette Collection. AQARAT is Boursa Kuwait listed (KRE); Bahar is Vice Chairman & CEO.

hotels.name: Th8 Palm Dubai Beach Resort
hotels.notes: Boutique beachfront resort on the west crescent of Palm Jumeirah. AQARAT-owned, Vignette-flagged.

hotels.name: Al Riggae Hotel
hotels.notes: AQARAT-held income-producing hotel asset in Kuwait. Unbranded / independent operation. Exact address and key count not publicly disclosed.

hotels.name: Courtyard by Marriott Hamburg-Airport
hotels.notes: Hamburg Airport area Courtyard, held by AQARAT as a JV asset. Demonstrates AQARAT's European exposure outside Kuwait/UAE.

hotels.name: Fairmont The Palm
hotels.owner: Arzan Investment Management (AIM) — anchor of GCC Hospitality Fund
hotels.notes: 381-room Fairmont on the west crescent of Palm Jumeirah. Acquired by AIM from IFA HR in January 2025 for US$325m as the anchor asset of AIM's GCC Hospitality Fund; IFA HR retains a minority interest via the AIM Hospitality Fund. Bahar is Chairman of AIM.

hotels.name: voco Bonnington JLT
hotels.notes: Rebrand of the former Bonnington Jumeirah Lakes Towers. Acquired by AIM Q4 2024. JLT cluster J location.

hotels.name: Pine Cliffs Resort
hotels.address: Praia da Falésia, Pinhal do Concelho
hotels.notes: Flagship UIP resort on the Algarve clifftops. Luxury Collection-flagged hotel anchors a broader resort-residence community (Pine Cliffs Residence). Bahar is Chairman & co-CEO of UIP.

hotels.name: Sheraton Cascais Resort
hotels.address: Rua das Palmeiras, Quinta da Marinha
hotels.notes: 138-room Sheraton resort in Cascais, west of Lisbon. UIP-owned.

hotels.name: Hyatt Regency Lisboa
hotels.notes: 204-key Hyatt Regency in Belém district of Lisbon, near Jerónimos Monastery. UIP-owned.
